prompt_snapshot:
16:9 horizontal Chinese blog body illustration, 2560x1440.
Use the provided chibi Avilia reference as the character identity anchor.

Scene: Avilia separates a K-line scroll into two layers: raw unadjusted data and adjustment factor. She then recombines them into a clean adjusted K-line card. Small arrows show "存储" then "调用时计算".

Core meaning: store raw data and adjustment factors separately, then calculate adjusted data when needed.

Style: technical but simple Chinese blog illustration, white background, black/red/white, tiny blue calculation marks. Minimal labels: "未复权", "复权因子", "调用时计算".

Avoid complex formulas, avoid PPT diagram, avoid too much text.
